message:
test(notifications): add pipeline integration tests (wa-psm.4)

Adds 7 integration tests that exercise the full notification pipeline:
Detection → NotificationGate (filter/dedup/cooldown) → WebhookDispatcher.

Tests cover: gate filtering before dispatch, gate allowing dispatch to
multiple endpoints, dedup preventing second dispatch, severity filtering
blocking info events, per-endpoint event pattern filtering, mixed
success/failure delivery, and config→gate→dispatcher wiring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
